description: Style NoteStylish to the T. These vintage- inspired handbags from fossil come with a stylish upper and spacious inner. Crafted from imperial leather, these handbags double up as an accessory speaking volumes about your personality. Product DetailsBrown handbag with flap and click- clock closureHas a main compartment with a zipped pocket and organizer sleevesTwo short handles with a key and heart shaped lock detail for styleKeyhole detail at the back for added styleBranding on the frontBronze legs at baseMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 46 cmDepth: 10 cm
